{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 2.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 2.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Impact

_What kind of vulnerability is it? Who is impacted?_

Storage credentials are written to the console.

### Patches

_Has the problem been patched?_ Yes, see #3589
_What versions should users upgrade to?_
- Any version after or including commit 1d6f852cd6534f4bea978cbdc85c583803d79f77
- No release has been created yet.

### Workarounds
_Is there a way for users to fix or remediate the vulnerability without upgrading?_

- Be aware that `kopia repo status --json` will write the credentials to the output without scrubbing them.
- Avoid executing `kopia repo status` with the `--json` flag in an insecure environment where.
- Avoid logging the output of the `kopia repo status --json` command.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-04-10T17:15:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2024-04-10T17:15:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/kopia/kopia/security/advisories/GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg", "https://github.com/kopia/kopia/pull/3589", "https://github.com/kopia/kopia/commit/1d6f852cd6534f4bea978cbdc85c583803d79f77", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kopia/kopia/security-advisories/GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/kopia/kopia", "summary": "Kopia: Storage connection credentials written to console on "repository status" CLI command with JSON output", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T14:18:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j5vm-7qcc-2wwg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.16.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/kopia/kopia"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.16.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Kopia: Storage connection credentials written to console on "repository status" CLI command with JSON output
